docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLUGER, DANIELIA AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEOS, MARTIN CENDAJAS DOES 1-20 PEREZ, ROTILLO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-22-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DECLARATION OF KENNETH G JOHNSON FOR OSC RE:PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLUGER, DANIELIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-27-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AUG 27, 2002 POS OSC IS OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-20-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2002 CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). OCT-30-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-11-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
